name: codex-network-doctor
description: Layered network diagnostics for Codex/OpenAI and Claude/Anthropic connectivity, powered by the ai-net-doctor CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose VPN, DNS, proxy, TLS, and Codex/Claude connectivity.
interface.longDescription: Runs the ai-net-doctor CLI to test, along the client's real network path (direct / env proxy / macOS system proxy), whether Codex/OpenAI and Claude/Anthropic are reachable. Localizes the first broken layer (DNS/TCP/TLS/HTTP/auth/proxy), distinguishes network failures from auth/quota issues, and flags proxy pitfalls (NO_PROXY bypass, env vs system proxy divergence, transparent TUN/fake-ip). The skill only calls the CLI and translates its JSON — it never re-derives the verdict.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a network diagnostic for Codex and Claude and summarize whether the network is the problem.
